revision.comment: Moving [[:Category:IPA templates]] to [[:Category:International Phonetic Alphabet templates]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Speedy]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Specify the language to link to the key for a specific language, as in: :{{WikiIPA|French}} which yields: :{{WikiIPA|French}} If the key subpage name differs from the language name, specify a second parameter, as in: :{{WikiIPA|Urdu|Hindi and Urdu}} which yields: :{{WikiIPA|Urdu|Hindi and Urdu}} {{IPA templates}} {{Hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[ar:قالب:ويكي أصد]] }} [[Category:International Phonetic Alphabet templates]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
